basics.name: location
basics.label: Region
basics.toolTip: Azure region for the demo environment.

basics.name: baseName
basics.label: Base name
basics.toolTip: Short prefix used for deployed resource names.

options.text: Leave Enable Microsoft Fabric unchecked to deploy without Fabric. The MCP will use bundled dataset-seed in Local mode. When enabled, run infra/scripts/setup-fabric-provision-identity.ps1 in a PowerShell 7 terminal to create the UAMI, assign it a role on your Fabric workspace, and paste the values below.

elements.name: enableFabric
elements.label: Enable Microsoft Fabric
elements.toolTip: When enabled, provisions a Fabric lakehouse, seeds lakehouse data, and configures MCP to read supporting case context from Fabric.

elements.name: fabricWorkspaceName
elements.label: Fabric workspace name
elements.toolTip: Required when Fabric is enabled. Name of an existing capacity-backed Fabric workspace.

constraints.validationMessage: Workspace name must be 1-256 characters (letters, digits, spaces, underscore or dash).

elements.name: fabricLakehouseName
elements.label: Fabric lakehouse name
elements.toolTip: Lakehouse to create or use inside the workspace. Leave the default unless you already have a lakehouse with the same name.

elements.name: fabricUamiResourceId
elements.label: UAMI resource ID
elements.toolTip: Required when Fabric is enabled. Paste the managedIdentityResourceId printed by setup-fabric-provision-identity.ps1.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be the full Azure resource ID of a Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities resource.
